code: import i18n from'i18next';import{initReactI18next}from'react-i18next';import{getCookie}from'../helpers/CookieHelpers';import translationEN from'./en/translation.json';import translationJP from'./jp/translation.json';import translationKR from'./kr/translation.json';import translationRU from'./ru/translation.json';import translationZF from'./zf/translation.json';import translationZH from'./zh/translation.json';export var resources={en:{translation:translationEN},kr:{translation:translationKR},jp:{translation:translationJP},ru:{translation:translationRU},zh:{translation:translationZH},zf:{translation:translationZF}};i18n.use(initReactI18next).init({lng:getCookie('APP_LANGUAGE')||(window.location.hostname==='cn.chowispartner.com'?'zh':'kr'),resources:resources});
